nasb.text: You shall fasten it on a blue cord, and it shall be on the turban; it shall be at the front of the turban.

esv.text: And you shall fasten it on the turban by a cord of blue. It shall be on the front of the turban.

cnv.text: 你要用一條紫藍色細線把牌子繫住，好使它安在禮冠上，就是在禮冠的前面。

ccb.text: 再拿一条蓝色带子，把它系在礼冠前面。
